products.title: Gaming PC Prebuilt Desktop Computer | 16G Memory | 512G SSD | AMD Ryzen5 5600GT | 6Core CPU Integration Radeon Vega Graphics | Wi-Fi Gamer Pcs White
feature_bullets: About this item Powerful Performance: The AMD Ryzen 5 5600GT 12-thread performance powerhouse delivers up to 4.4GHz for smooth operation, effortlessly handling multitasking! Run office software, stream 4K videos, and edit documents simultaneously without lag—designed for efficient productivity!

Ultra-fast 16GB DDR4 memory + 512GB SSD: Dual-channel 16GB DDR4 memory delivers a smooth multitasking experience. The 512GB SSD boots Windows in seconds, loads games 5 times faster than traditional hard drives, and transfers files at lightning speed!

Cool RGB lighting show design: Features 5 RGB fans + tempered glass panel, creating a mesmerising lighting show! Customise lighting effects to suit your personal preferences. Advanced airflow design ensures components stay cool even under heavy loads. The focal point of your desk!

Meet all your needs: widely applicable in various scenarios, such as office work, commerce, industrial design, home entertainment, point-of-sale systems, home office, and remote education. This Suevery computer is ready to go, plug and play.
›See more product details
